testimonials.quote: I was rejected by three banks. I felt hopeless. Then Purple Homes helped me find my dream home with owner financing. Now I'm building equity instead of wasting rent!
After my divorce, my credit took a hit. Traditional lenders wouldn't even look at me. Purple Homes saw my potential, not just my score. Best decision I ever made.
As a self-employed contractor, banks treated me like a risk. Purple Homes treated me like a person. My family finally has a place to call our own.
The process was so simple. No endless paperwork, no judgment. Just real people helping real families achieve their dreams. I tell everyone about Purple Homes.
I thought homeownership was impossible for someone like me. Purple Homes proved me wrong. My kids finally have a backyard to play in.
From application to keys in hand - the whole team made it seamless. They really care about getting families into homes. Can't recommend them enough!
